name: Struts: Form Field Without Validator
description: A Struts form field has no corresponding validation definition in the Struts Validator configuration, so user input for that field passes through unvalidated even when the framework is otherwise properly configured.
detection_pattern: META[struts_validation_config] lacks a validation rule for a form field defined in STRUCTURAL[form_bean], so INGRESS[form_field_data] for that field bypasses CONTROL[struts_validator] and flows directly to TRANSFORM or STORAGE without validation
